name: Choiceone Bank
description_short: ChoiceOne Bank is a full-service community bank offering checking, savings, loans, mortgages, credit cards, and wealth management services with FDIC insurance and digital banking capabilities.
description_long:
ChoiceOne Bank is a publicly traded community bank (NASDAQ: COFS) that operates as a comprehensive financial institution serving both personal and business customers. The bank emphasizes community-focused banking with a mission to help customers reach their financial goals through accessible, innovative services.

The bank offers an extensive range of personal banking products including multiple checking account options (Secure Plus, Freedom), savings accounts, money market accounts, CDs, IRAs, and health savings accounts. On the lending side, ChoiceOne provides auto loans, RV loans, student loans, and personal credit cards (Rewards Platinum, Cash Rewards Platinum, Visa Signature, and Secured Platinum options). Their mortgage services include home purchase loans, refinancing, new construction financing, home equity loans, and home equity lines of credit.

For business customers, ChoiceOne offers small business checking and savings accounts, business loans (including working capital lines of credit, equipment financing, real estate loans, agricultural loans, medical loans, and SBA loans), business credit cards (Express Loans), and comprehensive treasury management services (ACH, positive pay, wire transfers, merchant card services, remote deposit capture, and lockbox services). The bank also provides wealth management through a private banking division and brokerage services in partnership with Ameriprise.

ChoiceOne distinguishes itself through community commitment—they've awarded grants (including $1 million to Fresh Coast Alliance), maintain multiple physical locations, offer financial calculators and learning resources, and have received recognition including a 2025 WebAward for their website. Their CEO was named to Crain's Grand Rapids Most Influential Leaders list. The bank supports first-time homebuyers with dedicated resources and homeowner assistance programs.
services: Savings accounts and money market accounts
Personal credit cards (Rewards Platinum, Cash Rewards Platinum, Platinum Edition, Secured Platinum, Visa Signature)
Home equity loans and home equity lines of credit
Business loans (working capital, equipment, real estate, agricultural, medical, SBA)
Treasury management services (ACH, positive pay, wire transfers, merchant card services, remote deposit capture, lockbox)
Wealth management and Ameriprise brokerage services
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Multiple checking account options tailored to different needs (Secure Plus, Freedom)
Comprehensive mortgage services including purchase, refinance, new construction, and home equity options
Robust business banking with SBA loans, treasury management, and merchant services
Wealth management and brokerage services through Ameriprise partnership
Mobile banking app available on App Store and Play Store
Community-focused with homeowner assistance programs and first-time buyer resources
Award-recognized website and customer service infrastructure
cons: Limited information on specific interest rates and APRs for products on the website
No mention of online-only or neo-bank features that may appeal to digital-first customers
Wealth management and brokerage services appear to require partnership with external provider (Ameriprise) rather than direct offerings
No pricing transparency for business services like ACH, wire transfers, or merchant services on public website
Physical location requirement may not suit customers seeking purely online banking
best_for: Community-oriented customers seeking relationship banking with local decision-making
Small business owners needing integrated checking, lending, and treasury management
Homebuyers seeking comprehensive mortgage options and first-time buyer support
Customers wanting FDIC-insured accounts with both traditional banking and investment options
diagnosis: ChoiceOne Bank is best for community-focused customers, small business owners, and homebuyers seeking full-service banking with personal service and local accountability. The main caveat is that specific product pricing, rates, and terms are not transparent on the public website, requiring direct contact for detailed information on accounts and loan products.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
